data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of link shortening for booking links, which is explicitly listed in the needs of the linked use case. However, there is no evidence provided that demonstrates the implementation or functionality of link shortening within the system. This lack of evidence indicates a clear gap in meeting the specified requirement.
gaps: No evidence of link shortening functionality for booking links.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
